-OwGPkMJTzFrYOxX_2aW.text: I wish I had been honest with you. I wish I had confessed things while you were still here with me. Every day feels so heavy with thoughts of what I could have done if things were still okay. There are things I wish I had just fixed instead of walking away.

-OwGTmRGqfyAfawMJhrA.text: I'm sorry I was not there for you.

-OwGTqHGuIaLj4C4w4Gd.text: You mean a lot to me.
